Container.Name: HelpDeskBadge
Container.Overview: Help Desk Badge Generator — Employee badge creator for punk rock shows. Fans create custom ID badges, join the org chart, and download their badges.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent data (SQLite database, photos, badges, thumbnails)

Config.Name: Admin Token
Config.Description: Bearer token for admin panel access. Leave empty to disable admin.

Config.Name: Admin Local Only
Config.Description: Set to 1 to restrict admin to localhost only (disable when using Cloudflare Tunnel)

Config.Name: Trust Proxy
Config.Description: Trust X-Forwarded-For headers (enable when behind Cloudflare/nginx)

Config.Name: Show Mode
Config.Description: Set to 1 for relaxed rate limits during live shows

Config.Name: BOM Vote Banner
Config.Description: Force-show or force-hide the 'Vote for Help Desk' banner. Values: auto (date-gated to June 1-30, 2026), on, off
